sections.name: Lena Sign-Off (Medium-Long variant)
sections.content:
With care,
Lena ——
Customer Support · Mom of two autistic sons

P.S. One of my sons was 8 before we figured anything out. I spent years thinking were the only ones. We weren't. Neither are you. The community link is at the bottom of this email, bookmark it for whenever you're ready.

---

### Copy Notes & Source Citations

| Element | Source |
|---------|--------|
| "he's never given me a signal in 8 years" | 05-customer-language-bank.md §B3: Cat 1 (#148) |
| "He paused. He looked down at the wet spot." | 05-customer-language-bank.md §A7 (#104, #102) |
| "He's not trained. But he's feeling something." | Level Messaging Matrix §4.7 Tier 2 (Peer L3 Testimonial) |
| 60-day guarantee (implied via "no obligation") | V8 (60-day guarantee); S2 §1.12 L3 |
| "My son was 8 before we figured anything out" | Layer-09-voice-lena.md §1.3 (Phase 3 fragment) |
| Dignity-first framing throughout | Level Messaging Matrix §4.2 (Dignity Test) |
| "Late is not never" implicit theme | Brand Voice Reference §7.1 Approved Phrases |
| L3 Emotional Arc: quiet acceptance → redefined success | S2 §2.5 (PP-Extended Education Emotional Arc) |
| No urgency, no pressure, no promises | Level Messaging Matrix §4.5 (Tonality Calibration) |

why.raw:
label: "Why we chose this story",
      body: "Sarah isn't our best case. She's our most common one. Her situation is close to what many families find — a child on the spectrum, a couple of years of tried methods, a low point that felt like an ending, and then a method that finally matched the map.",

e6.raw: meta: { part: "Part 6 of 6", timing: "+8 days", theme: "The Invitation"

covered.raw:
label: "What's covered",
      items: [
        "Your child refusing to wear them — full refund.",
        "No visible progress in 60 days — full refund.",
        "A regression during the trial period — full refund.",
        "Any reason at all you decide it's not the right fit — full refund.",
      ],

signoff.raw:
line1: "With you,",
    name: "Lena Bauer",
    ps: "P.S. If you ever want to reply and tell me about your child — I read every one. Really.",

footer.raw:
tagline: "Calm progress, one day at a time.",
    links: ["Our Method", "Shop the Pants", "Parent Stories"],
